supervisor: Manager Internal Control, Manager Digital Banking Reconciliation and Dispute Management, Director Merchant and Agent Management, Director Mobile & Internet Banking, Director Mobile Money, Director Card Banking and Senior planning and support officer.
job_objective: To design and implement the digital banking business strategies, plans, and procedures and oversee digital banking services and operations. To foster and enhance the digital banking business of the Bank.
responsibilities: ['Designs and develops the digital banking strategies;', 'Proposes strategies to enhance the efficiency of card banking products, agent and merchant network management activities;', 'Oversees the development of new types of online/mobile banking product/services or enhancements on existing products or services based on market demand;', 'Ensures the continuous availability, functionality, and harmonious integration of all digital service channels being deployed by CBE;', 'Supports the work of bank committees, especially the Resource Mobilization and Product Development committees;', 'Analyzes needs, assesses capacities, and proposes to the Product committee new digital payments products and services;', 'Ensures that the necessary and prompt support is provided to the Regional and District teams; Commercial Bank of Ethiopia Job Description', 'Performs regular, annual assessment of all departmental work practices and proposes improvements where necessary;', 'Synchronizes the work and communicate constraints and problems with Customer Account Payment Department (Automated Transfer Services), Regional Offices and EVP -Branch and retail Banking;', 'Keeps the Bank management regularly informed of trends and developments in digital banking products and services;', 'Oversees appropriate risk identification, measurement and management is in place in the operational activities of the division;', 'Coaches and mentors Department Directors;', 'Sets management team objectives, goals, and performance standards and facilitate teams alignment and cascading; evaluates and measures performances and takes appropriate actions;', 'Consolidates and reviews budgets of the divisions and ensures effective and efficient utilization;', 'Performs other duties as assigned.']

responsibilities: ['Set steam objectives/goals, performance standards, works on team alignment and goal cascading;', 'Plans, directs and coordinat es the activities of the Digital Banking Reconciliation and Dispute Management Unit;', 'Manages the accounts or transactions used to handle both the acquirers and issuers;', 'Ensures timely reconciliation and settlement of any type of cards and transactions rela ted with CBE Birr and Tele-Birr;', 'Timely responds to customers complain and any issues that arise from call center to the level of their satisfaction;', 'Manages disputes that emanated from either of Eth -Switch or any International Card Payment Scheme;', 'Ensures that all transactions are processed accurately and efficiently;', 'Checks existence of effective utilization of physical and financial resources and takes the necessary action if there is any misuse;', 'Ensures effective utilization of budget and manages controllable expenses;', 'Motivates and coaches the team under his supervision for better productivity;', 'Identifies performance quality gap and reports to the Vice- President for further action;', 'Ensures proper understanding and implementation of the Digital Banking Procedure and business objectives by all performers within the team; Shall provide on -the-job training and assistance based on requests;', 'Ensures that all performers in the team discharge duties and responsibilities as indicated in the Digital Banking Procedure; takes appropriate and timely action on performers who contravene;', 'Propose Write - off and Write -back as per the relevant procedure of the Bank and Forward the proposal for Vice- President Digital Banking;', 'Authorizes user access right and privileges of card and CBE birr reconciliation system and infrastructure for concerned staff;', 'Conducts periodic performance evaluation of staffs under Digital Banking Reconciliation and Dispute Management Unit; and']
